title: Start Where You Are
subtitle: Your first expedition
intro: Look around. Even the most familiar place is full of life you've never noticed. Find three living things and log them.
outro: You just contributed real data to science. Welcome to Dragonfly.

steps.hint: Grass, a weed in a sidewalk crack, a tree, a houseplant by a window -- all count.
Check under a leaf, near flowers, or on a wall.

steps.description: Find one more living thing -- your choice
steps.hint: Bird, fungus, spider, snail -- surprise us.
